articles.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
articles.description: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.

articles.title: Trump says US studying troop cuts in Germany, after Merz criticises war

articles.title: Jewish agency warned of 'high' threat level ahead of Bondi shooting, report finds

articles.title: China to ban drone sales in Beijing citing security concerns

articles.title: 'I did not expect it': Kenya's Sabastian Sawe welcomed home with jubilant celebrations
articles.description: The first man to run a marathon in under two hours in a competitive race received a hero's welcome from supporters and family when he arrived home.

articles.title: US singer D4vd bought tools online to dispose of girl's body, prosecutors allege

articles.summary: 米国の歌手D4vdが少女の遺体を処理するためオンラインで道具を購入したと検察が主張。弁護側は無罪を主張し、徹底的に弁護すると表明した。

articles.title: Christchurch mass killer loses bid to overturn conviction
articles.description: White supremacist Brenton Tarrant's appeal is "utterly devoid of merit", a New Zealand court has ruled.
articles.titleJa: クライストチャーチの大量殺人犯、有罪判決覆す試みに失敗
articles.summary: ニュージーランドの裁判所は、白人至上主義者ブレントン・タラントの控訴は「全くメリットがない」と判断し、有罪判決を覆す試みは失敗に終わった。

articles.title: First dots on the roadmap to exiting fossil fuels
articles.description: The message from inaugural talks on exiting fossil fuels was clear. It's not if, but when and how.
articles.titleJa: 化石燃料脱却へのロードマップの最初の点
articles.summary: 化石燃料からの脱却に関する最初の協議では、いつ、どのように脱却するかが焦点となり、世界的な環境問題への取り組みの第一歩が示された。

articles.title: Will EU bring in a windfall tax on oil companies?
articles.description: Five countries, including Germany, want the EU to bring in a so-called windfall tax to target energy companies benefiting from the price crisis. It can be done, but it's complex.
articles.titleJa: EUは石油会社に「棚ぼた税」を導入するのか？
articles.summary: ドイツを含むEU加盟5カ国が、エネルギー価格危機で利益を得る企業に対し、いわゆる「棚ぼた税」の導入をEUに求めている。実現は可能だが複雑な問題。

articles.title: Iran war: Pezeshkian says US blockade 'doomed to fail,' Centcom admiral argues otherwise
articles.description: Iran's president has said the US naval blockade both violates international law and will not succeed. The US military, meanwhile, is hailing its efficacy impeding oil shipments. Crude prices remain volatile. DW has more.
articles.titleJa: イラン戦争：ペゼシュキアン大統領、米国の封鎖は「失敗する運命にある」と発言、中央軍司令官は反論
articles.summary: イラン大統領は米国の海上封鎖を国際法違反とし、失敗すると主張。米軍は原油輸送の妨害に成功していると評価しており、原油価格は引き続き不安定。

articles.title: Hong Kong pro-democracy publisher Jimmy Lai honored by DW
articles.description: Before being imprisoned for 20 years, Jimmy Lai founded Hong Kong's largest pro-democracy newspaper. His son said the award shows that those who fight for the freedom of others "are never alone."
articles.titleJa: 香港の民主活動家出版社ジミー・ライ氏、DWより表彰される
articles.summary: 香港最大の民主派新聞を創刊し、投獄されたジミー・ライ氏がDWから表彰された。息子は、自由のために闘う人々が一人ではないことを賞が示していると述べた。

articles.title: Germany news: Economy shows surprise growth despite Iran war
articles.description: Germany's economy has grown more than expected, against a backdrop of rising energy costs and uncertain export markets. Meanwhile, VW reports a sharp drop in profits, as pressures mount on the carmaker. DW has more.
articles.titleJa: ドイツのニュース：イラン戦争にもかかわらず経済が予想外の成長

articles.title: India news: Exit polls out in key state elections
articles.description: Projections suggest mixed outcomes in West Bengal, Kerala, Assam, Puducherry and Tamil Nadu. Narendra Modi's BJP is trying to make inroads in three states where it has never held power. Follow DW.

articles.summary: 西ベンガル州など主要5州の出口調査で様々な結果が予想される中、モディ首相のBJPは、これまで政権を握ったことのない3州での進出を目指している。

articles.title: Israel stops Gaza-bound aid flotilla in international waters
articles.description: More than 20 ships were intercepted in a mission aimed at challenging the blockade of the Gaza Strip. Israel dismissed those on board as "attention-seeking agitators."
articles.titleJa: イスラエル、ガザ行き援助船団を国際水域で停止させる
articles.summary: ガザ地区の封鎖に異議を唱えるため、20隻以上の援助船が国際水域で阻止された。イスラエルは乗船者を「注目を集めたい扇動者」だと一蹴した。

articles.title: Why UAE's OPEC exit is a blow to Saudi Arabia
articles.description: The United Arab Emirates is leaving OPEC to pump more oil on its own terms. The break strips Saudi Arabia of a key partner and adds to growing uncertainty over the cartel's future.
articles.titleJa: アラブ首長国連邦のOPEC脱退がサウジアラビアに打撃を与える理由
articles.summary: UAEが独自の条件で石油増産のためOPECを脱退。これによりサウジアラビアは主要パートナーを失い、カルテルの将来への不確実性が高まる。

articles.title: Women journalists in Ghana encounter – and overcome – gender barriers
articles.description: In Ghana, DW Akademie works with women journalists as they try to advance in their careers despite gender barriers.
articles.titleJa: ガーナの女性ジャーナリストたち、ジェンダーの障壁に直面し、それを乗り越える
articles.summary: ガーナでは、DWアカデミーが女性ジャーナリストと協力し、ジェンダーの障壁にもかかわらずキャリアアップを目指している。

articles.title: North Korea faces food shortages as drought threatens crops
articles.description: The country's state-run news has said much of the country has been hit by an unusually severe drought. The largely isolated country, with a population of over 26 million, was already facing food shortages.
articles.titleJa: 北朝鮮、干ばつが作物を脅かし食糧不足に直面
articles.summary: 国営メディアによると、北朝鮮は異常な干ばつに見舞われ、作物が脅かされている。人口2600万人以上の孤立した同国は、すでに食糧不足に直面していた。

articles.title: South Africa deports Mugabe’s son for unrelated offences after employee shot at family home
articles.description:
Bellarmine Chatunga Mugabe also fined after pleading guilty to immigration and firearms-related offences
Two months after an employee was shot in the back at the Mugabe family home in a wealthy suburb of Johannesburg, a South African court has fined and ordered the deportation of Robert Mugabe’s youngest son over two unrelated charges.
Bellarmine Chatunga Mugabe, 28, and his cousin Tobias Mugabe Matonhodze, 33, were initially both charged with attempted murder after the incident on 19 February.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 南アフリカ、従業員が自宅で銃撃された事件とは無関係の罪でムガベ元大統領の息子を国外追放
articles.summary: 南アフリカの裁判所は、従業員銃撃事件とは別の移民法・銃器関連違反でムガベ元大統領の息子を国外追放・罰金処分とした。

articles.title: ‘It will never cover what’s authentic’: African music industry weighs up AI risks and rewards
articles.description:
Delegates at event in Cape Verde highlight opportunities from tech while stressing AI is no replacement for talent
Last July, the Nigerian singer-songwriter Fave found herself caught up in a viral moment: an unauthorised version of a track by her featuring an AI choir had been released, quickly becoming an internet sensation. To get ahead of the situation, she recorded her own remix that integrated the AI-assisted song and added it to her discography.
“In my view, [that] was smart and very business aware,” Oyinkansola Fawehinmi, a Lagos-based entertainment lawyer, observed a few months later. “She essentially reclaimed the ‘AI version’ and released it as her own official expression.”
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 「本物を決して覆い隠すことはない」：アフリカ音楽業界、AIのリスクと報酬を検討
articles.summary: カーボベルデでのイベントで、アフリカ音楽業界の代表者たちがAIの機会とリスクを議論。AIは才能の代替にはならないと強調。

articles.title: Calls for humanitarian corridor through strait of Hormuz as Iran war hits vital aid
articles.description:
Soaring oil prices and the blockade are preventing food, fuel and medicine being delivered to millions of people in desperate need, say NGOs
The volatility of global oil prices caused by the US and Israel’s war on Iran is taking a toll on the most vulnerable people, by slowing or blocking food and medical aid from reaching them.
Now aid organisations are calling for a “humanitarian corridor” to be opened through the strait of Hormuz amid rocketing transportation costs.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ホルムズ海峡経由の人道回廊開設を求める声、イラン戦争が重要な援助を直撃
articles.summary: 米国とイスラエルのイラン戦争による石油価格高騰と封鎖が、人道援助物資の供給を阻害。NGOはホルムズ海峡に人道回廊の開設を要請。

articles.title: Russia claims its Africa Corps group prevented coup in Mali after rebels seize towns
articles.description:
Kremlin-controlled paramilitaries also alleged it inflicted ‘irreplaceable losses’ on insurgents avoiding civilian casualties
Russia’s defence ministry has claimed its Africa Corps – the successor to the former Wagner mercenary group – prevented a coup in Mali over the weekend, avoiding mass civilian casualties and inflicting “irreplaceable losses” on rebel insurgents.
It said in a statement that its troops in the desert town of Kidal near the Algerian border had fought for more than 24 hours while completely surrounded and vastly outnumbered. It also alleged, without providing evidence, that the militants had been trained by European mercenary instructors, including Ukrainians. The casualty toll was not specified.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: ロシア、反乱軍が複数の町を掌握後、アフリカ軍団がマリでのクーデターを阻止したと主張
articles.summary: ロシア国防省は、旧ワグネルの後継組織であるアフリカ軍団がマリでのクーデターを阻止し、反乱軍に壊滅的打撃を与えたと主張。

articles.title: Fears of resurgence in Somali piracy after three vessels hijacked in a week
articles.description:
Pirates appear to be taking advantage of international naval strength being diverted to Middle East
Three vessels have been hijacked off the coast of Somalia in the past week, raising fears of a resurgence in piracy around the Horn of Africa, and adding to the woes of the global shipping industry.
The merchant vessel Sward was taken over on 26 April, a day after a dhow was seized. These followed the 21 April hijacking of Honour 25, a motor tanker carrying 18,000 barrels of oil, according to the Maritime Security Centre Indian Ocean (MSCIO), the tracking service of the EU’s naval force.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 1週間で3隻の船舶がハイジャックされ、ソマリアの海賊行為復活の懸念が高まる
articles.summary: 過去1週間でソマリア沖で3隻の船舶がハイジャックされ、アフリカの角における海賊行為の復活が懸念されている。

articles.title: Mexico’s cartel crackdown hits top ranks – but will it fuel Jalisco violence?
articles.description:
Arrest of potential next leader found hiding in drainage pipe highlights renewed tactics – and fears of cartel infighting

US politics live – latest updates

The golden coffin of “El Mencho”, the late leader of the Jalisco New Generation cartel (CJNG), had barely been lowered into the ground when the Mexican military dealt a second blow to the very top of the organisation this week.
As special forces descended on a ranch in the state of Nayarit, grainy drone footage showed El Mencho’s possible successor, Audias Flores, alias “El Jardinero”, being hauled from a drainage pipe he had tried to hide in, all without a shot being fired.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: メキシコ、カルテル幹部を摘発するもハリスコ州の暴力激化を招くか？
articles.summary: メキシコ軍がハリスコ新世代カルテルの次期リーダー候補を逮捕。新たな戦術を示す一方で、カルテル内抗争激化の懸念も。

articles.title: ‘Historic breakthrough’: Colombia climate talks end with hopes raised for fossil fuel phaseout
articles.description:
Nearly 60 countries back voluntary roadmaps to wean world off coal, oil and gas, at conference prompted by frustration with UN climate summits

Business live – latest updates

Europe live – latest updates

Governments have been asked to develop national “roadmaps” setting out how they will end the production and use of fossil fuels, after a landmark climate meeting involving nearly 60 countries.
The voluntary plans will form the bedrock of a new initiative to wean the world off coal, oil and gas, the focus of two days of intensive talks in Colombia this week.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 「歴史的進展」：コロンビア気候会談、化石燃料段階的廃止への期待高まる
articles.summary: コロンビアでの気候会談が終了し、約60カ国が化石燃料の生産・使用を段階的に廃止するための自主的なロードマップを支持。

articles.title: US charges Sinaloa governor and other Mexican officials with drug trafficking offences
articles.description:
Indictment accuses high-level officials in Sinaloa of offences such as drug trafficking,  weapons offences and kidnapping 
The US justice department has charged the governor of Sinaloa and nine other current and former Mexican officials for alleged ties to the Sinaloa cartel, accusing them of aiding in the massive importation of illicit narcotics into the United States .
Some officials were members of Mexico’s progressive ruling party, Morena, posing a political conundrum for Mexican president Claudia Sheinbaum as she seeks to offset mounting pressures from the Trump administration.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 米国、シナロア州知事らメキシコ当局者を麻薬密売容疑で起訴
articles.summary: 米国司法省がシナロア州知事らメキシコの高官10人をシナロア・カルテルとの関係、麻薬密輸などの罪で起訴。

articles.title: US supreme court conservatives seem to favor ending TPS for Haitians and Syrians
articles.description:
Nine justices were hearing Trump administration that it has authority to strip immigrants’ temporary protected status 
The US supreme court heard oral arguments on Wednesday over whether the Trump administration can strip the temporary protected status (TPS) of hundreds of thousands of immigrant Haitians and Syrians, under a program that has shielded them from deportation owing to safety concerns in their countries of origin.
During the arguments, justices in the conservative-leaning majority appeared sympathetic to the Trump administration’s attempts to strip humanitarian protections for the Syrians and Haitians in this case.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 米最高裁の保守派、ハイチ人とシリア人のTPS終了に賛成の意向か
articles.summary: 米最高裁、ハイチとシリア移民のTPS剥奪を巡る口頭弁論。保守派判事らはトランプ政権の剥奪方針に好意的姿勢を示した。

articles.title: Thousands of US hockey fans sing Canadian anthem amid tensions between neighbor countries
articles.description:
Fans in Buffalo, only a few miles from Ontario, filled the silence when a microphone cut out at the start of a match
The Electric City. Nickel City. Queen City. City of No Illusions.
Buffalo, New York, has accrued many nicknames over the years but, in an age of growing tensions between two traditional allies, one among them has taken on extra resonance: the City of Good Neighbors.
 Continue reading...
articles.titleJa: 米国の数千人のホッケーファン、隣国間の緊張の中カナダ国歌を合唱
articles.summary: バッファローで行われたホッケーの試合で、マイクが故障した際に数千人の米国ファンがカナダ国歌を合唱し、両国間の友好を示した。

articles.title: Bank of England holds rates as Iran war sends oil prices to new highs
articles.description: The Bank joins the Fed and Bank of Japan in sitting tight, as war in the Middle East drives oil prices higher and blows the spring rate-cut playbook apart.
articles.titleJa: イングランド銀行、イラン戦争による原油価格高騰を受け金利を据え置き
articles.summary: 中東での戦争による原油価格の高騰を受け、イングランド銀行が金利を据え置いた。世界経済への影響が懸念される。

articles.title: Royal recruits boost volunteers as the Netherlands builds up its military reservists
articles.description: The royal seal of approval, together with recruitment campaigns running across the media, has proven so successful that the military is now working overtime to arm, train and accommodate the influx of newcomers.
articles.titleJa: オランダ、王室の支持を得て軍予備役の志願者が増加
articles.summary: オランダでは、王室の承認とメディアでの募集活動により、軍予備役の志願者が急増。軍は新兵の訓練と収容に奔走している。

articles.title: ‘Time to move forward, or be left behind’: Colombia climate talks end with fossil fuel phaseout push
articles.description: Europe dominated the Santa Marta fossil fuel summit. Here are the key takeaways.
articles.titleJa: 「前進するか、取り残されるか」：コロンビア気候変動会談、化石燃料段階的廃止で終了
articles.summary: コロンビアで開催された気候変動会談が終了し、化石燃料の段階的廃止が強く推進された。このサミットではヨーロッパが主導的な役割を果たした。

articles.title: Kyiv shuns Moscow's 'Victory Day truce' asking for long-term ceasefire
articles.description: After the Easter truce, Moscow is now proposing a Victory Day parade ceasefire as the Kremlin is concerned over Ukraine’s long-range striking capabilities. Moscow has already scaled down the parade, where for the first time in years, Russian armoured columns will not be rolling on the Red Square.
articles.titleJa: キエフ、モスクワの「戦勝記念日休戦」を拒否し長期停戦を要求
articles.summary: ウクライナのキエフは、ロシアが提案した戦勝記念日の休戦を拒否し、長期的な停戦を要求。ロシアはウクライナの長距離攻撃能力を懸念している。

articles.title: What to know about the EU’s new age verification app to protect children online
articles.description: The European Commission says the app will be free, anonymous and available on any device and has told EU countries they must roll it out by the end of 2026.
articles.titleJa: EUのオンライン児童保護のための新たな年齢確認アプリについて知るべきこと
articles.summary: EUは、子供をオンラインで保護するため、新たな年齢確認アプリを2026年末までに加盟国に導入するよう義務付けた。アプリは無料で匿名利用可能。

articles.title: Israel intercepts Gaza-bound flotilla, arresting 175 activists
articles.description: Isreal has intercepted a Gaza-bound aid flotilla in international waters near Greece, arresting 175 activists, with officials saying blockade enforcement is vital to stop weapons reaching the territory.
articles.titleJa: イスラエル、ガザ行き船団を阻止し活動家175人を逮捕
articles.summary: イスラエルは、ギリシャ沖の公海でガザ行き援助船団を阻止し、活動家175人を逮捕。当局は、武器流入阻止のため封鎖維持が不可欠と説明。

articles.title: Israel halts Russian grain ship amid stolen Ukrainian wheat row
articles.description: After days of diplomatic row between Ukraine and Israel, Israeli grain importer Zenziper said it is postponing the unloading of the grain on board the ship said to be carrying stolen Ukrainian grain on behalf of Russia.
articles.titleJa: イスラエル、ウクライナ産小麦盗難疑惑でロシア産穀物船を停止
articles.summary: イスラエルは、ウクライナとイスラエル間の外交問題を受け、盗まれたウクライナ産小麦を運ぶとされるロシア産穀物船の荷降ろしを延期した。

articles.title: Eurozone inflation hits 3% as oil prices spike and economic growth slows

articles.title: WTO members review safeguard actions, exchange views on measures affecting steel products
articles.description: At a meeting on 27 April, the WTO Committee on Safeguards reviewed safeguard actions covering 38 products, 12 of which were steel/metal products. These actions were notified by members since the Committee's last meeting in October 2025. Several members expressed their views on the European Union's and the United Kingdom's actions concerning steel products. The EU investigation on grain-oriented electrical steel and measure on ferro-alloying elements also generated interventions by several members. The outgoing Chair, Ms Milagros Miranda Rojas (Peru), thanked members for their participation in the Committee.

Mr Alaa Hegazy of Egypt was elected chair for the coming year.

As trade openness and transparency are key to Macao, China's strong economic performance, both leaders highlighted the importance of the WTO for supporting the ongoing contribution of Macao, China to the global economy.

The announcement was made in Amman on 23 April at a launch event hosted by the Jordan Enterprise Development Corporation (JEDCO), WEIDE's partner business support organization in the country.
articles.titleJa: ヨルダンの女性主導企業46社がWEIDEデジタル貿易プログラムから恩恵を受ける
articles.summary: ヨルダンの女性主導企業46社が、国際貿易への参加を強化するWEIDEデジタル貿易プログラムの受益者として選ばれた。

articles.title: Ethiopia steps up domestic reforms to advance WTO accession negotiations
articles.description: Speaking at a meeting of the Working Party on Ethiopia's accession to the WTO held on 22 and 23 April, Ethiopia's Minister of Trade and Regional Integration and Chief Trade Negotiator, Kassahun Gofe Balami, informed members of several key decisions taken by the Ethiopian Government in response to members' requests. He reported that the negotiations have "reached a decisive juncture" and reiterated Ethiopia's commitment to engage constructively and substantively to advance and finalize the accession process.
articles.titleJa: エチオピア、WTO加盟交渉を前進させるため国内改革を加速
articles.summary: エチオピア政府はWTO加盟交渉の進展に向け、国内改革を加速させていると表明。交渉は決定的な局面を迎えており、建設的な関与へのコミットメントを再確認した。

articles.title: WTO members discuss Aid for Trade, technical assistance, LDC priorities in Development Week
articles.description: WTO members examined Aid for Trade flows, the participation of least-developed countries (LDCs) in global trade and capacity-building for developing economies during WTO Development Week held from 20 to 22 April.
articles.titleJa: WTO加盟国、開発週間で貿易援助、技術支援、後発開発途上国の優先事項を議論
articles.summary: WTO開発週間で、加盟国は貿易援助の流れ、後発開発途上国の世界貿易への参加、開発途上国の能力構築について議論した。
